name: AI IT Incident Triage & Auto-Escalation System

parameters.text:
='You are an SRE incident triage assistant.

Analyze the following IT alert and return ONLY a valid JSON response. Do NOT include any explanation, text, or formatting outside the JSON.

========================
ALERT DETAILS
========================
Alert Name: {{ $json.alert_name }}
Service: {{ $json.service }}
Environment: {{ $json.environment }}
Host: {{ $json.host }}
Timestamp: {{ $json.timestamp }}
Severity Hint: {{ $json.severity_hint }}

========================
LOGS
========================
{{ $json.logs }}

========================
METRICS
========================
{{ $json.raw_payload }}

========================
INSTRUCTIONS
========================
- Classify severity accurately (ignore severity_hint if incorrect)
- Infer the most likely root cause
- Identify affected services if possible
- Recommend a clear, actionable step
- Decide if escalation is required
- Estimate user/business impact

========================
OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
========================
{
  "severity": "LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL",
  "confidence": 0-100,
  "root_cause": "one sentence explanation",
  "affected_services": ["service1", "service2"],
  "recommended_action": "specific actionable step",
  "escalation_required": true,
  "estimated_impact": "brief user-facing impact description",
  "triage_summary": "2-3 sentence summary for the incident channel"
}

options.systemMessage: You are an expert SRE (Site Reliability Engineer) and IT incident triage specialist with 10+ years of experience. You analyze infrastructure alerts and classify their severity accurately. You MUST respond with ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation, no code blocks. Just raw JSON.

nodes.name: Invite a user to a channel

parameters.text:
=📋 Jira ticket created: {{ $json.self }}

*{{ $json.key }}|{{ $json.key }}>* — {{ $('Parse AI Response').first().json.service }} {{ $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_severity }} incident

=={{ 
"🚨 *CRITICAL INCIDENT — " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.service.toUpperCase() + "*

" +

"*Incident ID:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.incident_id + "
" +
"*Service:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.service + "
" +
"*Environment:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.environment + "
" +
"*Host:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.host + "
" +
"*Time:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.timestamp + "
" +
"*AI Confidence:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_confidence + "%

" +

"*🔍 AI Root Cause Hypothesis:*
" + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_root_cause + "

" +

"*💥 Estimated Impact:*
" + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_estimated_impact + "

" +

"*✅ Recommended Action:*
" + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_recommended_action + "

" +

"*🔗 Affected Services:* " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.ai_affected_services.join(', ') + "

" +

"⚡ _Auto-triaged by AI | Jira ticket and runbook being prepared..._"
}}

documentId.cachedResultName: AI IT Incident Triage & Auto-Escalation System

main.node: Invite a user to a channel
